name: Rogz Kiddycat Safety Collar Xsmall Lime Paws (Cb207-L)
shortDescription: Rogz KiddyCat Safety Collar is snag-proof and durable. Made from a soft, pliable material, this collar is ideal for sensitive cats. The break-away safety buckle features three variable load settings that break open under enough strain from your cat to allow a safe escape. Soft Material | Snag-Proof | Breakaway Safety Buckle
description: Designed with comfort in mind, the Rogz KiddyCat Safety Collar is perfect for cats with sensitive skin. Made from soft, pliable, and snag-proof material , this collar is both gentle and durable ideal for everyday wear. The Safe lock breakaway buckle offers three adjustable load settings, allowing the collar to safely break open if your cat gets caught, reducing the risk of injury. With an 8mm width and a fully adjustable fit for neck sizes 16.5–23cm , this collar is suited for kittens and smaller adult cats who need a safe, comfortable solution for daily use and identification. Key Features: Soft and flexible for sensitive cats Snag-proof and durable for everyday wear Breakaway safety buckle with 3 release settings Adjustable fit : 16.5–23cm neck size | Width : 8mm Ideal for kittens and small cat breeds Keep your cat safe and seen after dark with the Rogz KiddyCat Safety Collar designed for both function and flair.
